---
metadata-files:
  - _variables.yml
pagetitle: "Clase {{< meta clase_nro >}}"
title: "Robótica"
subtitle: "Clase {{< meta clase_nro >}}"
date: today
date-format: "[Semana {{< meta semana >}} - {{< meta fecha >}}]"
institute: "FICH - UNL"
format:
    revealjs:
        theme: default
        #css: test-format.css
        footer: <a href="/">Robótica 2026 - Tecnicatura Universitaria en Automatización y Robótica </a>
        menu: false
        slide-number: c
        history: false
        code-overflow: wrap
        code-copy: false
        fig-format: svg
        include-in-header:
            text: |
                <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
                <style>.mjx-chtml{ font-size: 100% !important; }</style>
filters:
  - diagram
diagram:
    engine:
        tikz:
            execpath: pdflatex
            header-includes:
                - '\usepackage{amsmath}'
                - '\usetikzlibrary{arrows, shapes, intersections}'
                - '\usepackage{adjustbox}'
jupyter: python3
output-file: index.html
---

<!-- 
# Posicionamiento 2D {visibility="hidden"} 

{{< include slides/_2d-positioning.qmd >}}
 -->



# Transformaciones {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include slides/_intro.qmd >}}




# Rotaciones {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include slides/_2d-rotation.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_2d-rot-example.qmd >}}




# Traslaciones {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include slides/_2d-traslation.qmd >}}




# Traslacion y rotacion {visibility="hidden"} 

{{< include slides/_tras-rot.qmd >}}




# Pose {visibility="hidden"} 

{{< include slides/_pose.qmd >}}




# Transformaciones en ROS2 y `tf2` {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include slides/_ros2-tf2.qmd >}}




# Laboratorio {visibility="hidden"}

## [Laboratorio](lab.qmd) {.center}

Transformaciones 2D y `tf2`
